sellers_note: This 2020 Chevrolet Corvette Stingray 3LT represents a significant opportunity to own one of America's most iconic sports cars with exceptionally low mileage of just 5,454 miles. - 6.2L V8 engine with 8-speed dual clutch transmission - Head-Up Display - Bose Performance Series Sound System with 14 speakers - Performance Data & Video Recorder - Rear Camera Mirror with HD Front & Rear Vision Cameras - Heated and Ventilated Driver and Passenger Seats with Memory Settings - Custom Leather Wrapped Interior Package - Heated Steering Wheel - Wireless Charging for Devices - Power-Adjustable Outside Heated Mirrors - Rear Cross Traffic Alert and Side Blind Zone Alert - Sueded Microfiber-Wrapped Upper Interior Trim Package - 19 x 8.5 front and 20 x 11 rear bright silver wheels - Navigation System with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration The striking gray exterior catches attention immediately, while the meticulously maintained interior showcases premium appointments throughout. The 3LT trim level delivers comprehensive comfort and convenience features standard, including dual-zone automatic climate control, power adjustable seats with lumbar support, and an intuitive infotainment system that keeps you connected to your digital life seamlessly. Performance meets practicality with the legendary 6.2L V8 engine delivering spirited acceleration, while the eight-speed dual clutch transmission provides responsive gear changes. The rear-wheel-drive configuration offers the authentic sports car handling characteristics that Corvette enthusiasts demand. With an EPA rating of 15 city and 27 highway miles per gallon, this model balances capability with reasonable fuel efficiency for a vehicle of its caliber. Safety and awareness technology are integrated throughout the cabin. The rear camera mirror, combined with HD front and rear vision cameras, provides comprehensive visibility. Rear cross traffic alert and side blind zone alert systems work together to enhance your confidence during all driving conditions. The head-up display projects critical information directly into your line of sight, minimizing distraction. Every detail reflects the 3LT's commitment to refinement. The custom interior trim and seat combination creates an upscale environment, while the Napa leather seating surfaces with perforated inserts provide both luxury and support. The performance data and video recorder captures your driving moments for review and sharing. This Corvette Stingray is ready to become part of your driving experience. Contact our showroom to schedule a time to see this remarkable example in person and understand why this vehicle deserves your consideration. This vehicle is being sold as Ingersoll Certified Pre-Owned. This program gives you piece of mind. You will receive. A Vehicle Inspection and Reconditioning Form.
